mapper.update: update patient set is_del = 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.sql: id, case_no, name, gender, height, birthday, phone, id_card, address, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, remark
mapper.select: select from patient where id = #{id} and del_flag = 0
mapper.update: update patient set is_report = 1 where id = #{id}
update patient set is_report = 2 where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select from patient p where p.del_flag = 0 and p.is_report = 1
and p.case_no like concat('%', #{caseNo}, '%')
and p.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and p.phone like concat('%', #{phone}, '%')
order by p.id desc
